title: Why You Cannot Tickle Yourself

analysis.object: T634: Why You Cannot Tickle Yourself depth analysis

cerebellum_prediction.description: Cerebellum predicts self-touch: EML-2 prediction cancels EML-3 sensory oscillation
cerebellum_prediction.reason: Self-tickle fails: cerebellum is EML-2 predictor; predicted input is cancelled before EML-3 fires

external_tickle.description: External tickle: input is EML-inf from brain perspective (other consciousness = unpredictable)
external_tickle.reason: Other person is EML-inf: their timing is uncorrelated with your prediction; EML-3 fires fully

depth_mismatch_detector.description: Ticklishness fires when input depth exceeds prediction depth; gap = Deltad
depth_mismatch_detector.reason: Tickle theorem: ticklishness is Deltad mismatch detector; only fires when EML-inf exceeds EML-2 prediction

analysis.theorem: T634: Why You Cannot Tickle Yourself (S913).

key_theorem: T634: Why You Cannot Tickle Yourself (S913).
